brand.name: WR Doors
brand.legal: Wahat Al Ruman Doors Trading LLC
brand.endorsement: WR Doors is a DODA platform brand

home.metaTitle: WR Doors — Premium Doors & Home Services in UAE
home.metaDescription: Custom WPC doors, pivot aluminium entries, sliding systems, and wall cladding. Crafted in UAE with a 10-year warranty. Powered by DODA.
home.heroSubtitle: 1,000+ designs. Triple guard against water, sound, and termites. Built in our local factory and backed by a 10-year warranty.

localFactory.title: Local Factory
localFactory.body: Crafted in the UAE for fast delivery and direct quality control.

tripleGuard.title: Triple Guard
tripleGuard.body: Engineered against water, sound, and termites — every door, every time.

warranty10y.title: 10-Year Warranty
warranty10y.body: Peace of mind, guaranteed. Backed by our own factory and team.

exclusiveWpc.title: Exclusive WPC
exclusiveWpc.body: Custom UAE designs in premium Wood Plastic Composite — interior to exterior.

home.categoriesTitle: Doors and surfaces for every space
home.categoriesSubtitle: From luxury entryways to refined interior cladding — explore the four core product lines our factory delivers.
home.projectsTitle: Crafted for villas and developments across the UAE
home.projectsSubtitle: A selection of installations completed by our team — from boutique apartments to landmark residences.
home.whyUsTitle: A factory-direct relationship, not a reseller
home.servicesTitle: Three ways to engage with WR Doors

products.title: Product Sales
products.body: Choose from our catalog or commission a custom design. We measure, manufacture, and install.

consultation.title: Free Consultation
consultation.body: Book a site visit. We assess the space, recommend options, and provide a detailed quotation.

technicians.title: On-Demand Technicians
technicians.body: Plumber, carpenter, and installation services billed by the hour with assigned specialists.

home.testimonialsTitle: Trusted by villa owners and developers
home.testimonialsPlaceholder: Verified reviews coming soon. In the meantime, contact us for client references.
home.finalCtaBody: Tell us about your project — villa, apartment, or commercial. We'll send you a clear quote within 24 hours.

products.metaDescription: Explore our full range of premium WPC doors, pivot aluminium entries, sliding systems and wall cladding — manufactured in the UAE with a 10-year warranty.
products.heroTitle: Doors for every home, every vision
products.heroSubtitle: 8 signature designs across 4 categories — all manufactured in our UAE factory and available in custom dimensions.

tripleGuard.title: Triple Guard Protection
tripleGuard.subtitle: Every WR Doors product is engineered against the three biggest threats to doors in the UAE climate.

water.title: Water Resistant
water.body: Our WPC composite core is completely sealed against moisture — essential in UAE's 85–100% summer humidity.

sound.title: Sound Insulated
sound.body: Dense composite construction reduces airborne noise by up to 35 dB, creating quieter, more private spaces.

termite.title: Termite Proof
termite.body: No organic wood content in the structural core means zero termite risk — backed by our 10-year warranty.

quoteModal.title: Request a Quote
quoteModal.subtitle: Leave your details and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
quoteModal.messagePlaceholder: Villa/apartment location, required dimensions, quantity, timeline…
quoteModal.whatsappAlt: Or message us directly on WhatsApp
quoteModal.successBody: We'll reply within 24 hours. For a faster response, message us on WhatsApp.

categories.wpcDoorsSubtitle: Premium Wood Plastic Composite for interiors and wet zones
categories.wpcDoorsDesc: Humidity-resistant Wood Plastic Composite for interior doors, bathroom doors, and custom sizes.
categories.pivotDoorsSubtitle: Luxury exterior entryways with bold proportions
categories.pivotDoorsDesc: Statement entryways in 6000-series aluminium — built for UAE villas with powder-coat finishes that resist salt and dust.
categories.slidingSystemsSubtitle: Glass and aluminium space-savers for modern interiors
categories.slidingSystemsDesc: Glass-and-aluminium space-savers with floor-flush soft-close tracks — ideal for open-plan apartments.
categories.wallCladdingSubtitle: Fluted and patterned panels that elevate any room
categories.wallCladdingDesc: Fluted and patterned WPC panels that transform accent walls — available in walnut, oak, and custom finishes.

footer.tagline: Premium doors and home services for the UAE.
